kpis.name: On-time Delivery
kpis.description: Percentage of deliveries completed within agreed timeline

kpis.name: SLA Compliance
kpis.description: Service Level Agreement uptime compliance (missed SLA in Q2)

kpis.name: Incident Response Time
kpis.description: Average time to respond to critical incidents (above SLA)

kpis.name: Customer Satisfaction
kpis.description: User satisfaction rating (1-5 scale) — dropped significantly in Q2

incidents.description: Unplanned server downtime during business hours, affecting 60% of users for 5 hours.
Backup restoration failure during a DR test. Critical data was unrecoverable for 14 hours.

notes: ABC IT Solutions performed adequately in Q1 but reliability has dropped noticeably since Q2. Two medium-severity incidents, a budget overrun, and declining satisfaction scores suggest they are experiencing capacity or staffing constraints. Renewal requires performance improvement plan.
